news.t: Burney Company Launches Second ETF: Burney U.S. Equity Select ETF (BRES)

holdings.infoBox: BRES is an equity ETF with a total of 516 individual holdings. The top holdings are NVIDIA stock at 7.03%, Alphabet at 4.77%, Apple at 4.18%, Broadcom at 3.30%, and OTHER ASSETS AND LIABILITIES at 3.23%.

overview.description: The Burney U.S. Equity Select ETF (BRES) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in total market equity. The fund seeks capital appreciation by actively managing a narrow portfolio of US stocks of any market capitalization. Security selection uses an adaptive multi-factor model to identify companies with underappreciated growth potential. BRES was launched on Feb 4, 2026 and is issued by Burney.

data.title: Burney Company Launches Second ETF: Burney U.S. Equity Select ETF (BRES)
data.text: Core U.S. equity strategy brings decades of stock selection expertise to broader portfolio format RESTON, Va., Feb. 5, 2026 /PRNewswire/ -- Burney Company announces the launch of the Burney U.S. Equit...
